appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.seeThemes: For theme, background and customization, see the Themes tab.

language.label: Language
language.description: Display language for the Terax interface.

showHidden.title: Show hidden files
showHidden.description: Include dot-prefixed files and folders (.env, .gitignore, .config) in the file explorer and search.

gitDecorations.title: Git decorations
gitDecorations.description: Tint changed files and dim gitignored entries in the file explorer.

webgl.title: Use WebGL renderer
webgl.tooltip: xterm's WebGL renderer caches glyphs in a GPU texture atlas. On some macOS setups (especially with Nerd Fonts), the atlas corrupts and terminal text becomes unreadable. Turn this off as a fallback - performance dips slightly, but text renders correctly via the DOM renderer.
webgl.description: Hardware-accelerated rendering. Turn off if text shows corruption or blank tiles.

cursorBlink.title: Cursor blinking
cursorBlink.description: Blink the terminal cursor. Off by default for lower idle CPU, matching VS Code and the macOS terminal.

fontFamily.title: Font family
fontFamily.description: Nerd Font name for icons (e.g. "CaskaydiaCove Nerd Font Mono"). Leave blank to auto-detect.

shell.title: Integrated terminal shell
shell.descriptionNonIntegrated: Command blocks and directory tracking are unavailable for this shell.
shell.descriptionWsl: Shell for the integrated terminal. WSL spaces use the distro login shell. Existing tabs keep their shell.
shell.descriptionDefault: Shell for new terminal tabs. Existing tabs keep their shell.

workspaceEnv.title: Workspace environment
workspaceEnv.description: Where new spaces run, terminal and AI agent alike: Windows or a WSL distro. Existing spaces keep theirs; switch any from the status bar.

letterSpacing.title: Letter spacing
letterSpacing.description: Extra horizontal space between characters (px). Use negative values to tighten Nerd Fonts.

scrollback.title: Scrollback
scrollback.description: Lines of history kept per terminal. Higher uses more RAM (~3 KB / line).

notifications.title: Coding agent notifications
notifications.description: Alert when Claude Code or Codex running in a terminal needs your input or finishes. Desktop notification when Terax is unfocused, in-app otherwise.

launchAtLogin.title: Launch at login
launchAtLogin.description: Open Terax automatically when you sign in.

restoreWindow.title: Restore window position & size
restoreWindow.description: Reopen the main window where you left it. Applies on next launch.

header.title: Editor
header.description: Editing behavior, saving, and language servers.

vimMode.title: Vim mode
vimMode.description: Enable Vim keybindings in the code editor.

wordWrap.title: Word wrap
wordWrap.description: Wrap long lines instead of scrolling horizontally.

autoSave.title: Auto save
autoSave.description: Automatically save files after a delay when changes are detected.

autoSaveDelay.title: Auto save delay
autoSaveDelay.description: Delay before unsaved changes are saved automatically.

formatOnSave.title: Format on save
formatOnSave.description: Format the file on explicit save (Cmd+S / :w) with the formatter below.

formatter.title: Formatter
formatter.description: Language server formats the buffer before writing; Biome and Prettier run on the saved file from your PATH.

editorTheme.label: Editor theme
editorTheme.description: Syntax colors for the code editor. Auto follows the app theme.

background.label: Background
background.dropHint: Drop an image here or pick one. Stored locally; doesn't affect the default look until set.

resetDialog.title: Reset all shortcuts?
resetDialog.description: This will revert all your custom keyboard shortcuts to their factory defaults. This action cannot be undone.

header.title: Models
header.description: Connect the providers you use. Keys live in your OS keychain and are used only by Terax.

voice.title: Voice input
voice.descOpenai: Uses your official OpenAI API key and the Whisper model for transcription.
voice.descGroq: Uses your official Groq API key and Groq's Whisper endpoint for transcription.
voice.descWhispercpp: Connects to a local Whisper.cpp server for fully offline transcription.

providers.label: Providers
providers.emptyHint: Click "Add provider" to connect a cloud or local model source.

card.name: Name
card.optionalKeyPlaceholder: Optional - leave empty for unauthenticated endpoints

header.title: Agents
header.description: Personas and snippets the AI uses. Switch agents from the input bar.

customInstructions.label: Custom instructions
customInstructions.placeholder: e.g. Always reply in concise bullet points. Prefer pnpm over npm. My machine is an M-series Mac.

snippets.label: Snippets
snippets.description: Reusable instructions you can drop into any prompt with #handle.
snippets.empty: No snippets yet. Create one and insert it with #handle in the AI input.

agentDialog.name: Name
agentDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: One line - shown in the agent picker
agentDialog.instructionsPlaceholder: Persona & rules. Appended to Terax's core system prompt.

snippetDialog.name: Name
snippetDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: One line - shown in the # picker
snippetDialog.contentPlaceholder: Inserted into the prompt as a <snippet> block when you use #handle.
snippetDialog.errFormat: Lowercase letters, digits, and dashes only.
